description_long: This is a digital representation of an adult female pedestrian with a naturalistic human form and proportions. She is depicted standing upright with arms slightly extended downward and outward, as if in a relaxed or neutral pose. The figure is dressed in minimal, form-fitting undergarments that clearly define the contours of her body, including the torso, limbs, and facial features. Her hair is styled in a medium-length, layered cut that frames her face and falls just above her shoulders. The skin surface appears smooth and even, with subtle anatomical details such as fingers, toes, and facial structure visible. The overall appearance is realistic, suitable for urban environments where lifelike human figures are needed.
description: A realistic adult female figure standing upright in minimal, form-fitting undergarments with medium-length layered hair and natural body proportions.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full face, torso, and legs, with arms slightly extended and hair framing the face.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, chest, and legs, with the arm and hand visible along the side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, back, and legs, with arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, chest, and legs, mirroring the left side with similar anatomical details.
